sourceOfTruth: Exhaustive migration ledger for feature orchestration contracts across registered Flutter screens, marketing routes, and admin route components. A planned entry names its intended shared feature identity; grouped entries are secondary route projections, not independent features.

decisions.reason: Reference contract for Event Detail state, evidence, and booking-dock action orchestration.
Shared Organizer Detail contract covers the consumer profile, membership dock, schedule, host contact, loading, error, offline, and accessibility states.
Reference contract for discovery and map states plus empty-result recovery actions.
Compiled Dashboard Home contract covers route recovery, empty discovery, event focus, self-check-in, Catch and review entry, header navigation, registered enrichments, and accessibility states.

Compiled Event Success contract covers route gates, attendee moments, arrival actions, assignments, reveal, wingman, feedback, opt-outs, auto-launch evidence, and an explicit known questionnaire wiring gap.
Compiled Catches hub contract covers all registered states, active-window navigation, recap entry, and empty recovery.
Compiled event-scoped Catches contract covers queue, eligibility, pass/reaction mutation, and deck navigation states.
Compiled consumer Matches list contract covers threads, search, empty states, duplicate collapse, unread state, and chat entry.
Compiled member-chat contract covers messages, images, event context, profile/share/safety actions, Suvbot, and availability states.
Compiled self-profile contract covers loading, editing, photo operations, mutation feedback, preview, and settings entry.
Compiled public-profile contract covers viewer context, fallback loading, unavailable/offline states, and report/block safety actions.

Compiled Host Home contract covers authentication recovery, organizer switching, Today and Events projections, event lifecycle filtering, nested recovery, and typed create, repeat, manage, and task navigation.

Compiled Host Organizers contract covers organizer selection, Edit, Insights, Preview, settings spokes, profile and media writes, defaults, payouts, team management, host identity, hosted-organizer navigation, and sign out.
Shared Organizer Detail contract covers the host-shell public preview, dock suppression, access variants, hosted schedule routing, and route-level side effects.
Compiled Host Event Create contract covers route authorization, wizard choices and validation, media/location selection, drafts, submission, offline recovery, and success navigation.
Reference contract for Host Event Manage route/workspace states and primary lifecycle actions.
Compiled Host Inbox contract covers event/general scopes, booked/prospective audiences, search, conversation routing, roster-derived broadcasts, and recovery.
Shared chat-thread contract extends the same ChatScreen implementation with host-inquiry identity, disabled profile/share policy, retries, messaging, safety, and lifecycle states.

Member Onboarding extends the same WelcomePage implementation as a logged-out Start projection, preserving its reel, CTA, reduced-motion, text-scale, and fixed-dark states without inventing a duplicate feature.
Compiled Phone Authentication contract covers shared phone/country input, code delivery, OTP verification, cooldown resend, change-number recovery, mutation states, and accessibility evidence.
Compiled Member Onboarding contract covers three entry modes, booking identity, social profile, run preferences, draft resume, photo/prompt decisions, mutations, and the orphaned Instagram state.
Event Planning Calendar projection covers merged joined/saved agenda states, date navigation, secondary organizer-name lookup, recovery, and Event Detail handoff.
Event Planning binds Saved Events as a filtered projection of the same planned-event agenda and Event Detail handoff, while retaining its standalone route, back action, and saved-only evidence.

Compiled Matching Preferences contract covers profile loading/recovery, age and gender draft decisions, reset/apply lifecycle, exit behavior, accessibility, missing-profile blank state, and pending snapshot drift.
Compiled Event Recap contract covers route recovery, checked-in roster states, remembered-attendee selection, catch-window copy, and the selected-id handoff into Catches Event Deck.
Compiled Host Organizer Create contract covers wizard navigation, media and default choices, local draft recovery, validation, submission, and route-dismissal lifecycle.

The Host Event Manage contract includes the owner-edit projection, route recovery, editable and locked fields, its LocationPickerScreen modal result, validation, update mutation, and success return without misbinding the picker to Event Location Map.

Event Detail binds its read-only exact-location map as a child projection with route recovery, unavailable-coordinate behavior, deterministic map evidence, back navigation, and external walking directions.
Compiled Notifications contract covers access and activity provider waves, grouping/read-state evidence, mark-all-read lifecycle, and dynamic chat/event/organizer route handoff.
Compiled Reviews contract covers profile/review recovery, event-context projection, editable review selection, and the shared rating/update/delete sheet lifecycle.

Compiled Account Settings contract covers profile/blocked-account recovery, history and external navigation, seven preference decisions, unblock, deletion, sign-out, concurrency, accessibility, and theme states.
Compiled Payments contract covers identity/payment recovery, payment status variants, receipt inspection, event-title enrichment fallback, and failed-booking support guidance.
Compiled Marketing Home contract covers organizer/event discovery handoffs, Host routing, configured and unavailable store CTAs, and member waitlist submission.
Compiled Host Acquisition contract covers the interactive product narrative, operating previews, founding-host application, and post-submission handoffs.
Public-web organizer discovery projection is compiled into the shared Explore feature contract with route-state, action-owner, preview, and test evidence.
Compiled Organizer Claim contract covers organizer selection, claimant proof, verification, auth, typed submission, and authority-derived route states.
Compiled dynamic lookup projection of Organizer Claim preserves its own exact known, missing, pending, and unavailable authority states.
Published static legal content has route, metadata, and Storybook contracts but no stateful product action orchestration to duplicate here.
Published static legal content has route, metadata, and Storybook contracts but no stateful product action orchestration to duplicate here.
Published static support content has route, metadata, and Storybook contracts but no stateful product action orchestration to duplicate here.
Platform fallback surface is already governed by the route and static-output contracts rather than a product feature workflow.
Shared Organizer Detail contract covers canonical listing indexing, public API availability, external event supply, claim capability, save/share, and public review actions.
Legacy canonical/noindex projection of the organizer detail feature.
Compiled Access Review contract covers capped queue selection, direct evidence recovery, and audited approve or deny outcomes.

Read-only operational receipt monitoring is governed by the operations platform, admin route/component registry, callable contract, and deterministic Storybook state; it exposes no product or business mutation workflow.
Compiled Role Management contract covers exact-uid lookup, bounded assignments, high-risk confirmation, and before/after save receipts.
Compiled Data Quality contract covers multi-source health, exact signal detail, source-specific retry, and owning-workflow handoff.
Compiled Event Publishing contract covers canonical editing, import readiness, external evidence review, and gated read-only publication.
Compiled Finance Operations contract covers read-only issue derivation, exact detail, partial sources, and reconciliation guidance.
Compiled Growth KPI contract covers source-labelled signal detail, ranged analytics, and independent source recovery.
Compiled Supply Intake contract covers Event review, Organizer projection handoff, and read-only Automation run paging.
Compiled Organizer Intake projection preserves its independent default, workflow-readiness, and publication-packet state inventory.
Compiled Marketing Operations contract covers bridge recovery, studio navigation, draft creation, compliance, and review receipts.
Compiled Organizer Publishing contract covers canonical editing, publish checklist, index publication, and claim decisions.
Compiled Overview contract covers source-owned metrics, role-checked queue routing, and scoped Host Analytics.
Compiled live-controller projection preserves the query and lazy-boundary authority states without duplicating the visual product goal.
Compiled Safety Triage contract covers capped queue scope, encoded detail routing, assignment, decisions, and honest analytics.
Compiled User Analytics contract covers exact-uid aggregate reporting, validated scope, partial/empty states, and retry.
